## 4. Per-Distortion Agent Analysis  (RAG + LangGraph + Pydantic)

> **Methodology:** Each distortion type runs through a 4-node agentic graph:
> `observe` (Turn 1, no labels) → `hypothesise` (Turn 2, RAG-augmented)
> → `verify` (stat tool calls) → `conclude` (final structured output).
> If verify finds the hypothesis inconsistent with data, the graph loops
> back to hypothesise with the tool results as corrective context.

### 4.1  Blur — 1244 failures (26.3%)

**Most misclassified true classes:** cat (354), bird (233), horse (192), dog (135), deer (135)  
**Most common wrong predictions:** dog (861), cat (383)  
**Avg distortion confidence:** 0.0000  
**Epoch distribution:** ep0:953 · ep1:216 · ep2:75

**Images analysed (after semantic deduplication):**

## 6. Actionable Recommendations  _(LLM-generated from live failure data)_

> These recommendations are generated by the VLM from the actual failure
> statistics and root causes above — not hardcoded.

| Priority | Recommendation | Description | Addresses | Est. Impact |
|----------|---------------|-------------|-----------|-------------|
| 🔴 HIGH | **Add noise augmentation to training dataloader** | Noise accounts for 33.3% of failures (1579 images). Apply noise augmentation during training to expose the model to this degradation pattern. | noise (33.3% of failures) | ~20% reduction in noise failures |
| 🟡 MEDIUM | **Add blur augmentation to training dataloader** | Blur accounts for 26.3% of failures (1244 images). Apply blur augmentation during training to expose the model to this degradation pattern. | blur (26.3% of failures) | ~16% reduction in blur failures |
| 🟡 MEDIUM | **Add jpeg augmentation to training dataloader** | Jpeg accounts for 23.3% of failures (1102 images). Apply jpeg augmentation during training to expose the model to this degradation pattern. | jpeg (23.3% of failures) | ~14% reduction in jpeg failures |
| 🟡 MEDIUM | **Train longer with cosine LR decay** | Current 3-epoch run shows monotonically falling loss — model is undertrained. Add cosine annealing LR schedule and train for 20+ epochs. | All distortion types (underfitting) | ~15–25% overall accuracy improvement |
| 🟢 LOW | **Add fine-grained contrastive loss for animal cluster** | cat/dog/deer/bird/horse confusion dominates the top confusion pairs. Add SupCon loss to enforce larger embedding margins within the animal cluster. | Cross-class animal confusion | ~10% reduction in within-cluster confusion |

---
